instructions.summary: Integrate harrow-server-monoio with main harrow crate
instructions.objective: Make monoio server accessible via the main harrow crate with feature flags. Provide ergonomic API for runtime selection.
instructions.constraints: - Feature flags: tokio (default), monoio - No breaking changes to existing API - Consistent ServerConfig semantics - Document kernel requirements - Example code provided

context.tree:
harrow/ ├── Cargo.toml └── src/ └── lib.rs
harrow-server-monoio/ ├── Cargo.toml └── src/ └── lib.rs
harrow-server/ └── src/ └── lib.rs

guidance.notes:
Changes needed:
1. harrow/Cargo.toml: ```toml [features] default = ["tokio"] tokio = ["dep:harrow-server"] monoio = ["dep:harrow-server-monoio"] ```
2. harrow/src/lib.rs: - Re-export monoio server types under #[cfg(feature = "monoio")] - Consider namespaced exports: harrow::monoio::serve - Or explicit: serve_monoio, serve_tokio
3. Configuration parity: - Document differences (Rc vs Semaphore for max_connections) - Same defaults where possible
4. Create example: examples/monoio_hello.rs
